data.title: Better Home Equity Card Powered by Stripe Enables Easy Access to HELOC Funds and Introduces a Modern Access Layer Across the $21.4 Trillion Home Equity Market
data.description: Better Home & Finance Company (NASDAQ: BETR) unveiled the Better Home Equity Card at the Stripe Sessions 2026 conference. The card, developed on Stripe’s financial platform, offers homeowners prepaid debit access to funds from a secured Better HELOC. This integration facilitates financing, spending, and record-keeping in one system, streamlining processes for users. The initiative aims to reduce traditional hurdles faced by homeowners, marking a significant step in BETR’s offerings.
Key Takeaways From Fed Decision to Hold Rates Steady

data.title: Resilient Structures Expands Houston Facility, Plans Additional Production Lines to Meet Growing Demand
data.description: Houston-based company Resilient Structures (RS), known for its high-performance composite utility poles, has unveiled its new manufacturing facility in Houston. This marks a substantial step towards enhancing grid reliability and driving economic progress in the Gulf Coast area. The facility, situated in Humble, Texas, will aid utilities in fortifying their infrastructure to boost reliability amid escalating severe weather occurrences. The site serves as a testament to RS's commitment to investing in the region's growth and resilience.

data.title: MemorialCare Health System Announces Appointment of Barry Arbuckle as Executive Chairman; Dr. David S. Kim to Become President & Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Today, MemorialCare, a health system covering Orange and Los Angeles counties, declared that its CEO, Barry S. Arbuckle, Ph.D, will become the executive chairman. The announcement was made on April 29, 2026, in Fountain Valley, California. MemorialCare is known for providing integrated healthcare services and serving a significant population in the mentioned areas. Barry S. Arbuckle, Ph.D, has been the CEO and will transition into the new position of executive chairman, indicating a change in leadership within the health system.

data.title: Planful Launches Planner Assistant to Deliver Financial Forecasts Using Natural Language
data.description: The Planner Assistant utilizes anomaly detection and forecasting insights derived from the customer's unique planning models and the Planful Predict engine. This tool leverages the Planful Predict engine in conjunction with the customer's financial data to produce accurate forecasts and detect anomalies effectively.

data.title: Visa broadens crypto pilot to 9 chains, settling stablecoins at $7B run rate. Shows traction in global payments.
data.description: Visa has expanded its cryptocurrency pilot program to include nine different blockchains, indicating a rising interest in onchain settlement for international payments. This move comes as stablecoin volumes continue to increase, showcasing a significant development in the adoption of digital assets for financial transactions. The decision to diversify the number of blockchains in the pilot program suggests a growing acceptance and utilization of cryptocurrencies within the traditional financial industry.

data.title: Changelly celebrates 11 years with 12M users and broadened global partnerships in cryptocurrency exchange.
data.description: Celebrating its 11th year, Changelly, a prominent instant cryptocurrency exchange and renowned blockchain API provider, has reached a significant company achievement.

data.title: Teva Signals Confidence With $700 Million Pipeline Push, Buyback Plan
data.description: Teva Pharmaceuticals, a U.S. subsidiary of Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (NYSE: TEVA), has announced its acquisition of Emalex Biosciences, which includes the prominent asset ecopipam. The total acquisition cost will be $700 million, with a potential additional $200 million payout for Emalex's shareholders dependent on future commercial milestones and royalties related to global net sales of ecopipam, pending regulatory approval. This move aligns with Teva's Pivot to Growth strategy by expanding its late-stage innovative pipeline and commercial portfolio, as stated by Teva CEO Richard Francis. The transaction is expected to finalize by the third quarter of 2026, funded through Teva's existing cash reserves. Teva plans to offset the short-term margin impact of this acquisition and remains on track to achieve its financial goals for 2027.

data.title: "In Tune With AI" -- A New Global Index from 5WPR of the 50 Celebrities Most Aligned With the Artificial Intelligence Era
data.description: Talent Resources and 5W have released the inaugural list of recognized celebrities by AI engines, covering diverse entertainment genres. The ranking includes well-known figures such as Cristiano Ronaldo, Lionel Messi, LeBron James, Beyoncé, Bad Bunny, Shah Rukh Khan, and Kim Kardashian from Bollywood, K-pop, Afrobeats, Premier League football, and Latin music industries.
